perfect: Flawless! Are you sure you're not just a Turkish person pranking me? 🇹🇷
Zero mistakes. I'm genuinely a little scared of you. 👁️
Perfect score! The vocab don't stand a chance. 🏹
Mükemmel! (That means perfect — but you already know that.) ✨
100%! At this point just move to Istanbul. 🕌
Perfect score! Turkey is basically your second home. 🇹🇷
excellent: So close to flawless it hurts — in a good way! 🌟
Nearly spotless! One phrase put up a fight. 💫
Excellent! That one mistake is already forgotten. 🧹
One slip? Barely counts. You crushed it. 👊
So close to flawless it's almost annoying. Almost. 🌟
One mistake! Probably a typo. I'll allow it. 🧹
Nearly spotless! That one phrase will regret crossing you. ⚔️
One slip? Barely counts. You're basically fluent. 💫
great: Solid work! The vocab is clearly sticking. 🧠
Great effort! A few words are still hiding from you. 🙈
You're building something real here. Keep going! 🏗️
More right than wrong — that's a win. 🎯
Good stuff! A bit more practice and those gaps will close. 🔒
Pretty good! A few words are still laughing at you though. 😄
Solid effort! The vocab is only slightly winning. 📊
Not bad! Some words respect you. Others remain unconvinced. 🤔
You're getting there! The finish line can see you, sort of. 🏃
Good job! Istanbul wasn't built in a day, and neither is this. 🏗️
okay: Half right! Technically, that's also half wrong. Just saying. 🥛
50%! A coin flip could have matched this. To be fair. 🪙
You can do better. Your future self is cringing slightly. 😬
The glass is half full! Of mistakes. But also answers. 🔄
Halfway there! The other half is where the actual words live. 📚
poor: Turkish: 7, You: 3. The language is starting to feel sorry for you. 😬
A few more mistakes and the vocab will start avoiding you. 🏃💨
Rough round! The vocab is openly gossiping about you now. 🗣️
You got some right! Just... not most of them. Details. 📉
The vocab fought back today. Embarrassingly, they won. ⚔️
terrible: Wow. Just... wow. The vocab has filed a complaint. 📖
At this score, even the wrong answers are disappointed in you. 😔
Turkish is hard. What you just did was also hard, but differently. 💀
The vocab isn't angry. It's just very, very tired. 😮‍💨
This score is a cry for help and I hear you. We'll try again. 🆘
skipped_some: A few skips in there! The vocab noticed. 👀
Some exercises got away. They're relieved. I am not. 🏃💨
Skipping is a valid strategy. A cowardly one, but valid. 🐔
A couple of dodges! I'm writing your name down. 📝
You skipped a few. I won't tell. The vocab will though. 🗣️
skipped_most: Bold strategy: just skip half the lesson. Truly inspirational. 🎓
You skipped more than you answered. I'm questioning my purpose here. 🪞
The exercises you skipped have formed a support group. 🤝
Skipping most of the lesson and still showing up for the score screen. Respect, kind of. 🫡
